title: Brazil Dry Bulk Export Driver
summary:
Main
Having failed to breach 14m tonnes/month in 2022, Brazil's soybean and corn exports in July surpassed this level for a fifth successive month, supporting Panamax/Kamsarmaxes. Long-haul Brazil to China corn trade to further benefit Panamaxes/Kamsarmaxes, following last year's trade agreement,
Iron ore exports from Brazil are already running 15.3m tonnes higher YoY in first seven months of the year, government data confirm. Brazil continues to be the focal point for world grain trades in the Q3, as soybean exports wind down and corn cargoes appear in greater numbers.
